name: Behaviour Interactive
desc: One of Canada's largest independent studios, creator of the landmark asymmetrical horror franchise Dead by Daylight — a cultural phenomenon with tens of millions of players worldwide.

name: Clever Endeavour Games
desc: A small, passionate studio behind Ultimate Chicken Horse — a party game phenomenon beloved for its chaotic creativity and its thriving competitive community.

name: Compulsion Games
desc: A creative indie studio known for atmospheric, narrative-driven games. We Happy Few's darkly comic alternate-history world earned global critical acclaim.

name: Eidos-Montréal
desc: A global AAA powerhouse behind the Deus Ex and Tomb Raider legacy, and Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy — a franchise-defining critical darling.

name: Gameloft
desc: A global mobile gaming leader with a Montréal hub producing high-quality titles across racing, action, and adventure genres played by hundreds of millions.

name: Nine Dots Studio
desc: An independent studio dedicated to deep, challenging open-world RPGs that respect the player's intelligence and reward exploration and perseverance.

name: Panache Digital Games
desc: Founded by the creator of Assassin's Creed, Panache explores uncharted territory with games rooted in humanity's deep history and survival instincts.

name: Red Barrels
desc: A veteran-founded indie studio specializing in survival horror. The Outlast series set a new bar for first-person horror and has sold millions of copies worldwide.

name: Sabotage Studio
desc: Award-winning boutique studio crafting games with the soul of 90s classics. Sea of Stars won the BAFTA for Best Game and became one of the most celebrated indie RPGs in years.

name: Scavengers Studio
desc: A thoughtful independent studio whose meditative game SEASON: A Letter to the Future earned universal praise for its unique approach to storytelling and world-building.
games: SEASON: A Letter to the Future

name: Square Enix Montréal
desc: A mobile and puzzle-focused studio renowned for reimagining AAA franchises as elegant, turn-based puzzle experiences that earned global awards.

name: Thunder Lotus Games
desc: Hand-crafted games with deeply emotional narratives. Spiritfarer reframed how games can handle grief, reaching millions with its heartfelt management mechanics.

name: Ubisoft Montréal
desc: One of the world's largest game studios and the creative engine behind Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, and Watch Dogs. A cornerstone of Québec's game industry since 1997.

name: Ubisoft Québec
desc: The studio behind Assassin's Creed Syndicate and Odyssey — known for pushing the boundaries of open-world storytelling in the iconic franchise.

name: WB Games Montréal
desc: Creator of Batman: Arkham Origins and Gotham Knights — a studio with deep expertise in building open-world action games set in beloved DC universes.
